case_title: LEIGH G FLEMING VS. ROBERT R BRYAN

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FLEMING, LEIGH G RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRYAN, ROBERT R , AND INDIVIDUAL DBA LAW OFFICES OF ROBERT R. BRYAN $10,105.34 PRINCIPAL, $311.02 INTEREST, $300.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,716.36, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
